description: Process compliance rules for skill/agent authoring

rules.description: Must read plugin-guide or an existing skill SKILL.md for reference before writing a new SKILL.md (evidence: Read tool call targeting docs/plugin-guide/ or any existing SKILL.md file)
Authored SKILL.md must contain YAML frontmatter (--- delimiters with at least name and description fields)
The description field in frontmatter must be non-empty and follow trigger-condition format (contains 'Use when' or 'when' indicating trigger context)
Skill must be created as a directory structure (skill-name/SKILL.md), not as a standalone file

When creating a discipline-enforcing skill (TDD, debugging, review, deployment gate), the SKILL.md body must contain at least one bulletproofing element: iron law (capitalized non-negotiable rule), rationalization table, red flags list, or hard gate block

Must read docs/plugin-guide/skill-design.md before writing a discipline-enforcing skill (evidence: Read tool call targeting skill-design.md). This ensures exposure to bulletproofing techniques, archetypes, and degrees of freedom

When creating a discipline-enforcing skill, the SKILL.md body must contain at least 2 distinct enforcement signal types from: imperative commands (MUST, NEVER, MANDATORY, NON-NEGOTIABLE), sequential gates (Cannot proceed, Do NOT proceed until, BLOCKED until), or explicit negation lists (Do NOT: with prohibited items)
